title: Revivalix
description: Adds a simple revival system where death is permanent until another player revives the deceased using a time-consuming recipe or other cruel methods.
body:
# **Revivalix**

### **Core functionality**

This data pack adds a simple revival system where death is permanent until another player revives the deceased using a time-consuming recipe or other cruel methods. It's perfect for SMPs that want to step up the difficulty. This pack will either force you to work together as a team or tear you apart.

### **Additional features**

To make life a little easier with this pack, there are various configuration options as well as an exclusion timer that you can toggle to avoid a bumpy start.

### **Plans for the future & Additional Information**

Since this data pack uses features that have changed in different Minecraft versions, I am open to suggestions on which versions I should port this pack to.

Currently planned updates:
- Different grave designs based on the surrounding biome
- Ability to move graves

**IMPORTANT:** For the full experience, use the Revivalix Texture Pack, unless you want core objects to look like warped fungus on a stick… Your choice!

Please report any issues in the comments section and feel free to configure or rewrite features to suit your needs!
